name: Sweet 'n' Sour Sauced Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 small green bell pepper, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cooking oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add sesame oil and cook until fragrant.
3. Add carrot slices (cut thinly with a slant cut) and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add green bell pepper strips (seeded and cut into strips) and continue stirring-frying for another minute.
5. Add pork, breaking it up as needed, and cook until browned.
6. Stir in brown sugar, water, red wine vinegar, and soy sauce.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer and then add pineapple chunks and hot cooked rice.
8. Toss everything together and stir until well combined.
9. Reduce heat and allow the dish to gently simmer for 5-10 minutes, or until the flavors meld together.
10. Adjust seasoning with a dash of ground ginger if desired.
11. Turn off the heat and serve over steamed rice.
